matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: ROS1 fusion model (ROS1 oncogenic kinase-fusion model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a ROS1 ROS1 fusion kinase signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to ROS1 kinase fusion signaling, MAPK/PI3K/JAK pathway output, cell survival, and targeted-therapy biology and ROS1 fusion oncology context, Tyrosine kinase inhibitor response. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed ROS1 fusion model dosage suggests this sample carries the ROS1 prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests a ROS1 ROS1 fusion kinase signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to ROS1 kinase fusion signaling, MAPK/PI3K/JAK pathway output, cell survival, and targeted-therapy biology and ROS1 fusion oncology context, Tyrosine kinase inhibitor response. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. This specific marker is curated as ROS1 oncogenic kinase-fusion model. ROS1 fusion model is curated as a ROS1 marker for ROS1 fusion oncology context, Tyrosine kinase inhibitor response. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the ROS1 kinase fusion signaling, MAPK/PI3K/JAK pathway output, cell survival, and targeted-therapy biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched ROS1 fusion model at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the ROS1 prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag ROS1 kinase fusion signaling, MAPK/PI3K/JAK pathway output, cell survival, and targeted-therapy biology.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.
